Bash(powershell -Command 'Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object State,OwningProcess')

Bash(powershell -Command 'Stop-Process -Id 47572 -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; Start-Sleep -Seconds 1; $conn = Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($conn\) { Write-Output '\\''still listening'\\'' } else { Write-Output '\\''port free'\\'' }')

Bash(powershell -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object State,OwningProcess; Get-Process -Id 47572 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object Id,ProcessName")

Bash(powershell -Command '$ids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess; foreach \($id in $ids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force -ErrorAction Stop } catch {} }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Measure-Object | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Count')
Bash(python -c "import sys, json; d = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('rows:', len\(d.get\('rows', []\)\)\); print\('meta:', d.get\('meta', []\)[:3]\)")

Bash(powershell -Command '$ids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Get-Unique; foreach \($id in $ids\) { try { Stop-Process -Id $id -Force } catch {} }; Start-Sleep -Milliseconds 500; Write-Output done')
Bash(python -c "import app; [print\(sorted\(r.methods - {'HEAD','OPTIONS'}\), r.rule\) for r in sorted\(app.app.url_map.iter_rules\(\), key=lambda x:x.rule\)]")
